desc: Aligns the vertical centre (bbox mid-Z) of every moving element to the reference element's bbox centre, in a single Revit transaction.
summary: Aligns the vertical centre (bbox mid-Z) of every moving element to the reference element's bbox centre, in a single Revit transaction.
usecase: Align adjacent pipes / ducts / luminaires to a datum element's centre.
notfor: Top-face alignment (use ByTop). Underside (use ByUnderside). Horizontal moves.
precondition: Active document. Reference + at least one mover resolved. All elements expose a bounding box.
postcondition: Each mover translated by (0, 0, dz) feet to match reference centre. Audit entry written.
logictree: 1) User or Bot supplies reference + mover ids. 2) Validate both resolvers. 3) Open Transaction, compute ΔZ via CalculateElementAlignment, call ElementTransformUtils.MoveElement per mover. 4) Commit, log move summary. 5) Any failure → WireFault + rollback (Transaction dispose rolls back on uncommitted).
